div.p: Kolmogorov-Smirnov test measures the maximum distance (D) between two Cumulative Distribution Functions.

ul.li: D (Statistic): Max vertical distance between CDFs [0,1].
p-value: Probability that drift is due to random chance.
H0 (Null): Hypothesis that distributions are identical.

g.text: 0x03 | Identify | x* where |CDF1 - CDF2| is max
H0: Both samples from same distribution
